ranked_top10.read: A group-owned schedule can avoid global dKV atomics only if routes are prepacked or cheaply filtered; naive panel ownership would rescan top-k once per group panel. k16_fill_x estimates how well per-token selected rows in each group panel fill MFMA K16 work.

decision.read: Group-owned accumulation has a usable metadata envelope only when group panels are large enough to keep K16 work filled. Naive group-panel ownership would rescan top-k once per panel, so any production kernel needs a prepacked route list or an in-producer segmented path. This planner does not time a HIP kernel and does not prove latency.
decision.next_kernel_gate: Prototype the best practical token_block/group_panel point as a compact route-list producer plus group-owned K16 accumulator, then compare S512 parity/timing against the active-list atomic gate before attempting S4096.

boundary_route_fanin.read: Actual LightningIndexer top-k fan-in is counted per compressed group from the TorchTitan-shaped boundary tensors. Prefix stats are the structured route used by earlier synthetic dKV probes at the same top-k; matching totals do not imply matching topology.
